# vtm_state (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `state_error_level` (String)
- `state_errors` (Set of String)
- `state_failed_nodes` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--state_failed_nodes))
- `state_license` (String)
- `state_pools` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--state_pools))
- `state_tip_errors` (Set of String)
- `state_virtual_servers` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--state_virtual_servers))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--state_failed_nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `state_failed_nodes`

Required:

- `node` (String)

Optional:

- `pools` (Set of String)


<a id="nestedblock--state_pools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `state_pools`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `active_nodes` (Set of String)
- `disabled_nodes` (Set of String)
- `draining_nodes` (Set of String)
- `failure_pool` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--state_virtual_servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `state_virtual_servers`

Required:

- `name` (String)

Optional:

- `pool` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `throughput` (Number)
- `ts_redirect_pools` (Set of String)
